requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of a PSB shall ensure that responsibilities of its directors are well-
defined, and every director is familiarised with the functioning of the PSB before
their induction, covering the following essential areas:

The Board shall specifically pay attention to
creating and sustaining a culture of control.
requirements.object: creating and sustaining a culture of control

In the absence
of the Chair of the Board, the meetings of the Board shall be chaired by an
independent director.
requirements.object: independent director

The quorum for the Board meetings shall be one-third of the total strength of the
Board or three directors, whichever is higher.
requirements.object: total strength of the Board or three directors, whichever is higher

requirements.full_sentence:
At least half of the directors
attending the meetings of the Board shall be independent directors.

A PSB shall determine the Board agenda items and the periodicity thereof, with
the approval of their Boards, such that there is adequate focus on matters of
strategic and financial importance, including the seven broad themes indicated
below:
<image>
Category Description
Development of new products Competitiveness of individual businesses Business reviews in relation to targets.
